tribe_v2_insight: High empathy activation for narrative emotional content engages the mirror neuron system, reducing critical distance
user_explanation: This uses emotional manipulation to override rational thinking. By triggering strong empathy or outrage, it engages your mirror neuron system and reduces your critical distance — making you more likely to share, react, or comply without questioning the content's accuracy or intent.
legal_note: Emotionally manipulative content designed to distort behaviour may fall under the EU AI Act's prohibition on subliminal manipulation techniques (Article 5).
